name: Hack Attack 2.0
description: TalentVerse is an AI-driven recruitment system designed to streamline hiring by addressing inefficiencies in traditional talent acquisition. The platform tackles key challenges such as overwhelming application volumes, spam/fake submissions, poor job-role matching, slow hiring processes, salary mismatches, and difficulty in assessing candidate authenticity.

corefeature.name: AI Resume Screening
corefeature.details: Automated resume parsing and semantic analysis using Mistral LLM, with scoring on skills, experience, and education. Includes spam filtering, missing skill detection, LinkedIn/GitHub verification, and AI-generated resume detection.

corefeature.name: AI Interview Bot
corefeature.details: Video-based preliminary interviews with dynamic, role-specific questions generated by Gemini AI, ensuring unbiased, one-take responses.

corefeature.name: Market Analysis
corefeature.details: AI-powered salary insights and competitor job postings to help recruiters set competitive offers and understand industry demand.

corefeature.name: Chatbot Assistant
corefeature.details: Embedded chatbot for context-aware Q&A about resumes and results.

name: KitaHack
description: Truth Chain is a blockchain-based social media platform designed to prevent fake news and scams. It combines AI-driven fact-checking, DAO-based governance, and crypto incentives to ensure transparency, credibility, and user engagement.

corefeature.name: AI + Credibility System for Scam Prevention
corefeature.details: Detects and eliminates AI-generated fake news, unsecured links, fake influencers, romance scams, job fraud, giveaway scams, and online shopping scams using AI and Google Fact Analysis with credibility scoring.

corefeature.name: Hybrid DAO Governance
corefeature.details: Combines AI analysis with community voting to ensure fair decisions. User votes only contribute 25%, preventing manipulation by agencies or groups.

corefeature.name: Immutable Transparency
corefeature.details: All flagged news is permanently stored on-chain, allowing users to review past decisions and ensuring censorship resistance.

corefeature.name: NFT & Crypto Engagement
corefeature.details: Native crypto for in-app transactions, with rewards for credible contributions and NFT-based ownership of exclusive content.

name: UM Hackathon
description: DONS (Donation System on Stablecoin) is a Shariah-compliant blockchain-based donation and Zakat platform designed to bring trust, transparency, and impact to charitable giving in Malaysia. It uses a MYR-pegged stablecoin (DONS Token) to ensure secure, transparent, and compliant donations, while leveraging AI, ZKP, and smart contracts to enhance privacy and accountability.

corefeature.name: Donation Center
corefeature.details: Browse, filter, and donate to urgent campaigns. Includes user-assigned urgency scores with AI verification, and filters for categories like Disaster Relief, Education, Medical, Waqf, Zakat, and Sadaqah.

corefeature.name: Organization Transparency Tracker
corefeature.details: Tracks how registered organizations spend donations, linking reports with verified news sources for real-world proof of impact.

corefeature.name: Info Hub
corefeature.details: Provides real-time disaster alerts, family/individual needs, and educational content sourced from verified partners and news outlets.

corefeature.name: User Dashboard
corefeature.details: Shows donation history, personal Zakat contributions, impact metrics (e.g., meals provided), and wallet balance with saved campaigns.

corefeature.name: Organization Registration
corefeature.details: NGOs, Waqf trustees, and Zakat bodies register with wallet accounts and verification documents. All projects are pre-approved by SIRC for Shariah compliance.

corefeature.name: DONS Wallet
corefeature.details: Users convert MYR to DONS stablecoin (1:1). Includes top-up, balance display, transaction history, and optional withdrawal. Secured with 2FA and blockchain records.

corefeature.name: AI & Privacy Features
corefeature.details: AI optimizes recurring donation subscriptions, ZKP ensures donor privacy, and smart contracts guarantee Waqf project funds are only released when criteria are met.

corefeature.name: NFT & Proof of Contribution
corefeature.details: NFT tokens act as donation receipts or proof of impact, ensuring transparency and donor engagement.

name: Code Nection 2025
description: Doc Helper is an AI-powered instant documentation tool on VS Code Extension designed to automate software documentation generation directly within the developer workflow. Delivered as a VS Code extension, it leverages embeddings and generative AI to analyze codebases, generate structured documentation, and maintain up-to-date project insights in real time.

corefeature.name: One-Click Documentation Generation
corefeature.details: Automatically generates comprehensive project documentation from code using embeddings and LLMs, reducing manual effort.

corefeature.name: AI-Powered Summarization
corefeature.details: Summarizes functions, modules, and commits into readable explanations for better team understanding.

corefeature.name: Multilingual Code Understanding
corefeature.details: Supports multiple programming languages by leveraging multilingual embedding models for consistent documentation across diverse codebases.

corefeature.name: Real-Time Documentation Status Bar
corefeature.details: Tracks code changes and updates documentation dynamically with every commit to ensure consistency and accuracy.

corefeature.name: QNA Chatbot
corefeature.details: Uses vector embeddings to enable semantic search and retrieval of relevant code snippets and documentation to answer developers' questions.

corefeature.name: Task Tracker Dashboard
corefeature.details: Provides a dashboard to track development tasks, features, and documentation coverage for improved workflow management.
